channel.title: Stock on My Workbook
channel.description: Recent content in Stock on My Workbook

item.title: Growth Stocks
item.description: Ceramics & Granite - Kajaria Ceramics Auto - Cars & Jeeps - Maruti Suzuki Auto - LCVs & HCVs - Eicher Motors Banks - Private Sector - Yes Bank (Management Not Good) - HDFC Bank ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ (5Y - 25%, 10Y - 25%) - Indusind Bank Ltd - Kotak Mahindra Bank ⭐️ (crisis in recession, took 5 Years to recover) (5Y - 26%, 10Y - 11%) Cement - Ultratech Cement - Shree Cement Limited ⭐️
